g.text: db_size = 0 │ Intermediate write; transaction still open
db_size > 0 │ Final frame; db_size = total pages after commit
Frame 0 │ Checksum seeded from WAL header checksum pair
Frame N │ checksum(N) = f(checksum(N-1), header_N, page_N)
Validation │ Any corrupt byte breaks the chain → frame rejected
Salt match │ Wrong salt = stale generation → WAL reset boundary
Bytes 0–3 │ Page number this frame stores
Bytes 4–7 │ 0 = non-commit frame; N = commit (db page count)
Bytes 8–11 │ Must match WAL header salt-1
Bytes 12–15│ Must match WAL header salt-2
Bytes 16–19│ Cumulative checksum (chained from prior frame)
Bytes 20–23│ Cumulative checksum (chained from prior frame)
Bytes 24 … (24 + PAGE_SIZE − 1) │ Raw database page content
